title: Footprint
description: the area of a target encircled by the field-of-view of a detector of radiation, or irradiated by an active system.

definitions.definition: the area of a target encircled by the field-of-view of a detector of radiation, or irradiated by an active system
definitions.sources:
- NIST [RD15]
- RD15: Prokhorov, A. V., R. U. Datla, V. P. Zakharenkov, V. Privalsky, T. W. Humpherys, and V. I. Sapritsky, Spaceborne Optoelectronic Sensors and their Radiometric Calibration. Terms and Definitions. Part 1. Calibration Techniques, Ed. by A. C. Parr and L. K. Issaev, NIST Technical Note NISTIR 7203, March 2005
